summary: Initial Release of the Ninth Path structured web interface.
breakingChanges: Requires clean reinstall of the Skyrim base folder.
New custom conflict resolution patch for LOTD is required.
added: Seeded 20 core mods and 8 core tools in search indices.
Introduced responsive, high-contrast dark fantasy user interface.
Added inline warnings, step lists, and fomod instruction renderers.

summary: Beta version with baseline Skyrim SE/AE support.
added: Added support for Steam Skyrim version 1.6.1170.
